abstract.t:
This document describes an authentication service that uses EAP transported by means of CoAP messages with the following purposes:
o Authenticate a CoAP-enabled device that enters a new security domain managed by a domain Controller.
o Derive key material to protect CoAP messages exchanged between them, enabling the establishment of a security association between them.
o Optionally, to generate key material for other types of Security Associations.
Generally speaking, this document is specifying an EAP lower layer based on CoAP, to bring the benefits of EAP to IoT.
